overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a player exploring a futuristic industrial research facility with 'HELIOS' branding. The player, holding a bloodied pistol, moves through outdoor facility grounds, interacts with a control terminal, observes a burning communication tower, discovers a dead body in a hazmat suit, and enters a covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial facility exterior with modular white buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial facility grounds holding a pistol, approaching the cylindrical storage tanks

entered.detail: large curved industrial structure with orange trim on the roof edge
rectangular yellow metal container with hazard markings
large white cylindrical building with orange stripe and HELIOS logo
tall metal lattice tower with satellite dishes and antennas
low white industrial building with A06 designation and green stripe

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking through an open industrial facility complex under a clear blue sky. White modular buildings with yellow accents surround the area, with a large cylindrical HELIOS tank and tall communication tower visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial courtyard with cylindrical storage tank

events.description: player fires pistol at the ground near blue barrels creating bullet impacts and sparks
approaches and stops at a wall-mounted control terminal with glowing screen

agents.ego_description: moving around the cylindrical tank while firing at the ground, then approaching a terminal on the white wall

entered.detail: cluster of blue industrial barrels stacked near the cylindrical building
wall-mounted electronic interface with glowing blue screen and buttons

segments.scene_description: The player moves around the large cylindrical HELIOS tank, firing the pistol at the ground near some blue barrels. The camera then approaches a control terminal mounted on the white wall of the A06 building.

events.description: interacts with the control terminal screen which displays green data readouts
camera tilts upward to reveal the communication tower is on fire at the top with black smoke rising

agents.ego_description: activating the wall-mounted control terminal then looking up at the burning tower

segments.scene_description: The player interacts with the terminal, causing the screen to light up with green data. Afterward, the camera tilts upward to focus on the tall communication tower, revealing flames and smoke at its peak.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated grated walkway between industrial structures

events.description: moves from open courtyard onto narrow yellow grated walkway between tall walls
discovers a dead body in yellow hazmat suit lying on the ground near a terminal

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the elevated grated walkway and discovering a deceased worker in a pool of blood

notable_agents.action: dead body of worker in yellow hazmat suit lying face down in a pool of blood

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with yellow painted edges and diamond plate pattern
white shipping container with GUILD logo suspended by cables
deceased worker wearing yellow and white protective suit with blood pooling around
recessed wall terminal with green illuminated screen near the body

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow passage with yellow grated flooring between industrial walls. A Guild shipping container hangs suspended ahead. At the end of the walkway, the player discovers a dead worker in a yellow hazmat suit lying near a control terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial corridor with overhead lighting

events.description: enters covered indoor corridor with overhead fluorescent lighting from the exterior walkway

agents.ego_description: examining the dead body briefly then moving into the covered corridor with overhead lights

entered.detail: covered walkway with white walls and green stripe markings
linear ceiling lights illuminating the corridor
large gray metal crate with yellow latches

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the deceased worker and enters a covered industrial corridor with overhead fluorescent lighting. The environment shifts from open sky to a sheltered walkway with white walls and a large metal storage container.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an open industrial complex that gradually transitions into a sheltered, sterile corridor. It begins by moving through a bright facility under a clear blue sky, passing white modular buildings and a large cylindrical HELIOS tank. As the camera approaches a control terminal on the wall of building A06, the screen flickers with green data before the view tilts upward to reveal a communication tower engulfed in flames and smoke. The scene then shifts into a narrow passage with yellow grated flooring and a suspended shipping container, leading toward the grim discovery of a worker in a yellow hazmat suit. Finally, the camera moves past the body and enters a covered industrial corridor, where the open daylight is replaced by the cold glow of overhead fluorescent lighting and white walls.
